action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 3 killed (exit code 137) after 7.5 min, likely CPU RAM OOM from attempting to store full 737-length ESM2 embeddings for 31.8k sequences (≈53 GB vs 48 GB RAM). Baseline spearman -0.0178 (random). Analysis: The memory bottleneck was loading full-length embeddings into CPU memory. We only need the 28-AA mutation region (positions 561-588). By slicing embeddings on-the-fly during batch computation and only accumulating the region, we reduce memory to ~2.2 GB. This is critical to make the pipeline work. Decision: Rewrite train.py to compute region-sliced embeddings in a memory-efficient streaming manner, cache them (2.2 GB), train RegionalTransformer for 100 epochs with validation Spearman tracking, and submit eval. Also update predict.py to stream test embeddings similarly.
